chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: In today's video, we will see what is Single Inheritance?

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: We will understand Single Inheritance in detail.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: This is the most common type of inheritance.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: We have seen this before but we have not seen it in the name of Single Inheritance.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Let's go to the computer screen and explore Single Inheritance.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Let's get started.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Intro

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So guys, now we are going to see about Single Inheritance.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So, first of all, I told you about inheritance, what it is and why we use it.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: We have discussed all those things.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Now we will see the exact implementation of Single Inheritance.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: How can you use Single Inheritance and what exactly it is?

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So, most of the inheritance is Single Inheritance.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: It is a class, it is also called as Parent Class.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: A child class is made from it.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: A second class is made from one class.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: This is Single Inheritance.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: The simplest form of inheritance.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So, Single Inheritance is a type of inheritance where a class inherits properties and behaviors

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: from a single parent class.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: This is the simplest and most common form of inheritance.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: You will see it the most.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: All the examples we have seen were examples of Single Inheritance.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: The syntax for Single Inheritance in Python is straightforward and easy to understand.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: It is a very straightforward syntax.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: What you have to do is,

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: it is not child-classic, it is parent-classic.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: You have to tell which parent class you have to make that child class and your work will be done.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Let's consider a simple example of Single Inheritance in Python.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So, you have to assume an animal class which I have made here.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Now, let's assume this is a make sound method in which any animal can make any sound.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: We have seen about method overriding.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Let's assume I make a class called Dog from this and I have written Bark here.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So, if I make any object of Dog, I will write here D is equal to Dog.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And after this, I will make a sound in D dot.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So, what will happen?

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Obviously, Bark will be printed but if I make A is equal to Animal

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: and I will do the same thing with Animal,

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: then what will happen?

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Sound made by the Animal will be printed.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So, what happens is that you...

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Actually, I have not given the two arguments for this.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So, let's do one thing.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Here, I will say Dog and here I will say Doggerman.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And I have to do the same thing here.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Let's assume I write Dog in Animal and after this, I will write Dog here.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Okay?

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: If I run this now, you will initially see here

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: sound made by an animal.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: You got Bark from here and you got sound made by animal from this.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Okay?

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So, the Dog class inherits all the attributes and behaviors of the Animal class

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: including the init method and make sound.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: But what did we do?

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: We said that our Dog class, which is a subclass,

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: will have its own init method.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And in that, we overwrote this method.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: We overwrote the make sound method.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So, what happens here?

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: The benefit of doing this is that we can increase the code reusability here.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So, the most common form of inheritance is single inheritance.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And this question is often asked that what type of inheritance is this?

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So, this is single inheritance.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So, you should know this thing.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Now, I want to give you a quick quiz here, which you have to do.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Okay?

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Quick quiz.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: I will write it here and I will also comment it out.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So that our code runs.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: What you have to do is to make a Cat class.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Implement a Cat class by using the Animal class.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Add some methods specific to Cat.

chunks.title: Single Inheritance in Python

chunks.text: You have to do this.

chunks.text: And after making it, you have to show it to everyone and post your reply in the comment section.

chunks.text: Now, we have seen other types of inheritance.
